title: Drug Products - Canada.ca
content:
Health Canada applies the Food and Drug Regulations under the authority of the Food and Drugs Act to ensure that the pharmaceutical drugs offered for sale in Canada are safe, effective and of high quality.

## What information can you find here?
This section contains links to information on legislation and guidelines related to drug products.
- Acts and Regulations Memorandum of Understanding Notices & Early Consultation Canada Gazette Part I Canada Gazette Part II
- Memorandum of Understanding
- Notices & Early Consultation
- Canada Gazette Part I
- Canada Gazette Part II
